title: KcBloodEffect
description: Lightweight Blood Particles Plugin. Support for Folia
body:
### Plugin Overview
- A highly lightweight blood splatter plugin that adds blood particle effects when attacking players or mobs.
- Compatible with Folia, with no command permissions or configuration files required.

### Image Preview
_Please check the gallery for the GIF images._
![Image Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06bce102c2de43605d6a8c19cecc315e41d3f615.png)
